message:
style(tui): styled Board/Insights footers, status badges, comment counts

Convert Board and Insights footer rendering from plain RichText::raw()
to styled_mode_footer() with dim prefix + box-drawing hints, completing
the upgrade so all 12 view modes now use consistent styled footers.

In Wide issue list mode, replace inline status text (e.g. "oopen") with
4-char status badge labels (OPEN/PROG/BLKD/DONE/etc.) rendered with
status-specific foreground and background colours via StatusBadge kind.

Add comment count (💬N) to Medium/Wide issue list suffix when comments
exist.  Update 13 affected snapshots and 1 inline test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
